### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 7: Tahwil arrives — the room widens with elevation, not impact: a warm radial bloom takes the background, and a composite scene of open palm, soft warm bloom, and a single testimonial phrase commits the pivot.
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 55%, rgba(196,137,74,0.38), rgba(42,31,20,0.96) 72%)"})
  - addCompositeScene({"group_label":"first muhayyar approach — pivot bloom","elements":[{"type":"image","query":"open palm cupped around small candle flame in deep shadow","position":"center, large inset","motion":{"prese)

Cycle 8: Sustained on the pivot — loose linen falls as a tall column on the left, the room widening on G while moonlight continues to breathe.
  - addImage({"query":"loose linen falling across a dark surface in low light","position":"left half","motion":{"preset":"drift","feature":"hijaz_intensity","intensity":0.6},"reactivity":[{"property":"saturation",)

Cycle 9: Floating on the upper jins as it eases — a small p5 sketch of soft breath rising on cold glass, mid-left, the breath motif planted for later reanimation.
  - addP5Sketch({"position":"mid-left","size":"medium","audio_reactive":true,"code":"\nconst WARM=['#e8d4a0','#c4894a','#8b4a2a','#f5e6c8','#d4a574'];\nconst COOL=['#4a6670','#8a9ba0'];\nconst SHADOW='#2a1f14';\nlet )

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 11 (t=60s): Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center G. Mid-performance.
Cycle 12 (t=65s): Intense, building. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center E. Mid-performance.
Cycle 13 (t=70s): Tahwil: tonal gravity has shifted to the ghammaz. Intense, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G. Mid-performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: Pivot station — first muhayyar approach (Tahwil at cycle 7. Composite scene — open palm in low candlelight, moonlight bloom, a single text fragment. Sustained on G; loose linen falls; quiet hold at cycle 10 with a single feather at rest.)
Cycle intent: Quiet hold (silence_ratio 0.26, dark timbre). Fade the older text from cycle 1. Single feather SVG settles. No new placements beyond the fade.
Energy hint: low

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
